user.title: Outback MATE3 Setup
user.description: Enter the WebSocket URL of the companion Outback MATE3 add-on. The default value works when the add-on is installed on the same Home Assistant instance.

hassio_confirm.title: Outback MATE3 discovered
hassio_confirm.description: The Outback MATE3 add-on is running. Add it to Home Assistant so it can stream telemetry to this integration via {url}?

reconfigure.title: Outback MATE3 — reconfigure
reconfigure.description: Point this entry at a different add-on WebSocket endpoint. Useful if the add-on slug, hostname, or port has changed.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the add-on.
error.timeout: Connection to the add-on timed out.
error.bad_handshake: Connected, but did not receive a valid snapshot message.
error.unknown: Unexpected error connecting to the add-on.

abort.already_configured: This add-on URL is already configured.
abort.reconfigure_successful: Re-pointed this entry at the new add-on URL.

addon_unreachable.message: Could not connect to the Outback MATE3 add-on at {url}. Is the add-on running?

addon_offline.title: Outback MATE3 add-on is not running
addon_offline.description: The integration can't reach the companion add-on at {url}. Start or restart the 'Outback MATE3' add-on in Settings → Add-ons → Outback MATE3.

version_drift.title: Integration and add-on versions don't match
version_drift.description: The Outback MATE3 integration is at version {integration_version} but the add-on is at {addon_version}. They ship together and should be kept on the same version; update whichever is behind.
